summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Bright Smile Dental Care website. All critical flows working: homepage, navigation, booking modal (end-to-end), FAQ accordion, contact form, services page. Backend API 5/5 tests pass. Mobile responsiveness verified.

issues: Services page title() returns 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of a branded page title like 'Services | Bright Smile Dental Care'

action_items: Minor: Update <title> tag for each page (About, Services, FAQ, Contact) to reflect branded page titles instead of generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App'
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Contact form submissions go to /api/appointments (same endpoint) - contact messages and appointments share the same collection, which may cause reporting/filtering confusion. ContactMessage model exists but is not used.
BookingModal date input uses browser native date picker (HTML <input type='date'>) - this is acceptable and functional
Services page: 10 service cards confirmed present with 'Book Consultation' CTAs
seed_data_creation: Created test appointments via API during testing (TEST_John Doe, TEST_Persist Check, Jane Smith)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages tested and working. Backend API at /api/appointments handles both appointment bookings and contact form submissions. FAQ uses Radix accordion (40 data-state items found). Booking modal date input requires .type('05102026') (MMDDYYYY) format to properly set React state - JS evaluate doesn't work for controlled inputs. Mobile: hamburger menu at 390px.
